original: The flames licking at your flesh intensify!
You cry out as the fire grabs at your "+{var0}+", catching hold and lapping at it lustily.
context: <<POS:00624421>> <<VARS:var0=e.inventory.armor.longName>> combatAppend(" You cry out as the fire grabs at your "+e.inventory.armor.longName+", catching hold and lapping at it lustily.")

original: “How the hell is that non-lethal?!” you yell at So.

“Pest creatures sometimes encroach on the factory space,” replies the AI, sounding mildly apologetic. “Fire induces a state of extreme submissiveness in them. My algorithms calculate a 71% chance that it will have the same effect on"+({var0}.isHuman()?"":" genetically modified")+" humans.”
context: <<POS:00624691>> <<VARS:var0=e>> combatAppend("\n\n“Pest creatures sometimes encroach on the factory space,” replies the AI, sounding mildly apologetic. “Fire induces a state of extreme submissiveness in them. My algorithms calculate a 71% chance that it will have the same effect on"+(e.isHuman()?"":" genetically modified")+" humans.”")
